overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player navigates through tunnels, highways, and dense commercial districts with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic featuring holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage exit transitioning to bridge approach

events.description: exits covered garage structure with green ceiling onto open bridge roadway
rain becomes visible as the vehicle emerges from the sheltered structure

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle through a covered parking facility and accelerating onto an urban bridge

entered.detail: green illuminated ceiling panels of the parking structure
distinctive red illuminated grid pattern on the garage floor
large illuminated sign indicating medical facility ahead
orange and white striped concrete barriers lining the bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered parking structure with a distinctive green ceiling and red grid floor pattern. The player drives forward, exiting onto a bridge approach with orange barriers visible, as rain begins to appear in the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass and medical plaza tunnel system

events.description: enters concrete tunnel passing under the medical center structure
passes large concrete walls with distinctive red X warning symbols

agents.ego_description: navigating through a concrete tunnel system beneath a medical facility, passing ventilation smoke

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing on the sidewalk under umbrellas near the tunnel exit

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
large red X warning symbols painted on the concrete plaza walls
steam or smoke venting from the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving through a concrete underpass beneath a medical facility, with large red X symbols visible on the walls and ventilation smoke drifting down. Pedestrians with umbrellas appear on the right sidewalk as the tunnel opens into a larger covered plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban commercial street with shops and neon signage

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open city street with heavy rain and neon lights
ambient lighting shifts from artificial tunnel to mixed neon and street lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising through rain-soaked city streets, passing commercial buildings and street-level shops

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and holograms
small shop with distinctive green awning and neon signage
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into open city streets with heavy rain falling. The environment features palm trees, commercial buildings with neon signage, and a corner store with a green awning. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights as the player drives through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with noise barriers and concrete walls

events.description: transitions from dense city streets to elevated highway ramp
navigates a curved ramp section with changing elevation

agents.ego_description: accelerating along an elevated highway, navigating curves and ramps with concrete barriers

entered.detail: concrete barriers with yellow and black diagonal warning stripes
tall green transparent noise barrier walls along the highway
tall street lamps illuminating the highway
silver metal guardrails along the curved highway sections

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to an elevated highway with concrete noise barriers and yellow-black striped warning barriers. The road curves through the urban landscape with tall street lights illuminating the rain-soaked asphalt, while distant neon towers remain visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: descends from highway into dense neon-lit commercial district with heavy signage
passes through area with intense pink and purple holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban traffic surrounded by towering neon billboards and holographic ads

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall buildings completely covered in bright neon signs and digital displays
large floating holographic advertisements in pink and purple colors
elevated highway overpass crossing above the street
bright red neon sign reading FOOD CAFE on building facade

segments.scene_description: Descending into a dense cyberpunk commercial district reminiscent of Times Square, with towering buildings covered in massive neon billboards and pink-purple holographic advertisements. The street is wet with rain, reflecting the intense neon colors, while moderate traffic and pedestrians populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel with cyan neon lighting and digital wall advertisements

events.description: enters enclosed tunnel with distinctive cyan blue neon strip lighting
approaching tunnel exit with bright light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: speeding through a narrow tunnel with cyan neon lights reflecting off the wet road surface

entered.detail: continuous cyan blue neon light strips running along the tunnel ceiling
smooth concrete walls of the enclosed tunnel section
large digital advertisement screens mounted on the tunnel walls
metal ventilation grates in the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow enclosed tunnel illuminated by distinctive cyan neon light strips along the ceiling. The smooth concrete walls feature digital advertisements, and the wet road surface reflects the blue-green lighting. The tunnel curves slightly as it approaches a bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with red barriers and heavy neon signage

events.description: exits cyan tunnel back into open neon-lit city street
navigates through moderate traffic with other vehicles changing lanes

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel into heavy rain and neon-lit streets, maneuvering through traffic and past commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: purple sedan changing lanes to the right, moving parallel to the player

entered.detail: low red concrete barriers lining the sides of the road
high-rise office buildings with illuminated windows
modern street lamps with bright white light
large digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cyan-lit tunnel back into the rain-soaked city streets, surrounded by red road barriers and tall office towers. The area features heavy neon signage, digital billboards, and moderate traffic including a purple sedan. The wet roads continue to reflect the vibrant city lights as the player navigates through the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered parking structure into the rain-drenched expanse of a neon-lit futuristic city. It begins by gliding across a red grid floor beneath a green ceiling, moving forward to exit onto a bridge approach where the first drops of rain appear. As the camera passes under a medical facility, the scene shifts through a concrete underpass marked by red X symbols and drifting ventilation smoke before opening into a covered plaza filled with pedestrians. The environment then expands into open city streets, where the wet asphalt reflects vibrant neon signage and green awnings under a heavy downpour. Finally, the path ascends onto an elevated highway, curving past yellow-black warning barriers and tall street lights toward distant glowing towers on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from a sprawling neon district through a sterile tunnel and back into the urban sprawl. It begins by descending into a dense commercial hub where towering buildings are draped in massive pink and purple holographic advertisements that reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, the open city gives way to a narrow enclosed tunnel defined by cyan neon light strips and digital wall displays that cast a blue-green glow over the smooth concrete. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from the tunnel's bright exit, returning to the open air amidst red road barriers and towering office blocks. Finally, the view expands back into the vibrant commercial district, navigating past a purple sedan and heavy neon signage under the persistent rain.
